_notes: Hand-curated by reading the US Core Condition-Encounter-Diagnosis differential (12 elements) line by line against the R4 Condition snapshot. Key R4 facts: clinicalStatus min=0 required:condition-clinical|4.0.1; verificationStatus min=0 required:condition-ver-status|4.0.1; category min=0 extensible:condition-category; code min=0 example:condition-code; subject min=1 Reference(Patient|Group); encounter min=0 Reference(Encounter); onset[x] min=0; abatement[x] min=0; recordedDate min=0. US Core adds assertedDate extension slice, makes category [1..*] with mandatory 'us-core' slice (encounter-diagnosis), makes code [1..1], tightens bindings, and adds USCDI annotations throughout.

drifts.description: New MustSupport extension slice 'assertedDate' added (max=1) using profile http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-assertedDate. Not present in R4 base Condition. MustSupport=true on a new slice (min=0).

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Condition.extension:assertedDate in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Binding version pin removed: R4 binds to 'condition-clinical|4.0.1' (version-locked). US Core binds to 'condition-clinical' (no version pin). Strength remains required in both.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Condition.clinicalStatus in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Binding version pin removed: R4 binds to 'condition-ver-status|4.0.1' (version-locked). US Core binds to 'condition-ver-status' (no version pin). Strength remains required in both.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Condition.verificationStatus in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
Cardinality changed: [0..*] -> [1..*]. At least one category becomes mandatory in US Core; R4 allows a Condition without a category.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
Slicing added on Condition.category: discriminator type=pattern, path=$this, rules=open. Allows named category slices to be defined.
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Condition.category in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
New mandatory slice 'us-core' added [1..1]: patternCodeableConcept coding system=http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-category code=encounter-diagnosis. No equivalent in R4 base.
MustSupport added on mandatory slice 'us-core' (min=1 -> conformance-critical). A new MS=true slice is added.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Condition.category:us-core in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Code becomes mandatory in US Core; R4 allows a Condition without a code.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).

Binding changed: R4 uses example strength to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-code. US Core tightens to extensible strength with http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-condition-code (US-specific condition codes). Binding strength tightened: example -> extensible.
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Condition.code in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
Reference target profile constrained: R4 allows Reference(Patient|Group). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-patient) only.
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Condition.subject in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Reference target profile constrained: R4 allows Reference(Encounter). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-encounter).
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Condition.encounter in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Condition.onset[x] in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Condition.abatement[x] in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Condition.recordedDate in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
